evals.prompt: Review this React component. I'm concerned about edge cases and security but not sure what I'm missing.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive 9-dimension review identifying: XSS vulnerability (dangerouslySetInnerHTML), missing error handling, no loading state management, unvalidated email update, type safety issues (any types), no cleanup on unmount, duplicate helper functions that should be extracted, missing tests.
expectations: Review includes dimension scores table with 9 rows
Identifies missing error handling on fetch calls
Identifies broken loading state (never set to true)
Identifies API calls on every keystroke (missing debounce)
Includes top 3 critical issues with severity labels
Covers all 9 dimensions (Robustness, Edge Cases, Naming, Comments, Reuse, Colocation, Decomposition, Consistency, Tests)

evals.prompt: This Python script processes data files and saves results. Can you review it for code quality?
evals.expected_output: Review identifying: file handle leaks (no context manager), duplicated calculation logic across user types, magic numbers (1.5, 2.0, 3.0), poor variable names (x, y, z), no error handling, hardcoded config URL, no input validation, duplicate save_results calls, missing type hints, no tests.
expectations: Review includes dimension scores table with 9 rows
Identifies file handle leaks (missing context managers)
Identifies duplicated calculation logic (3 nearly identical blocks)
Identifies cryptic variable names (x, y, z, d)
Includes top 3 critical issues with severity labels

evals.prompt: Review this Express.js API handler for user management. I want to make sure it's production-ready.
evals.expected_output: Review identifying: SQL injection vulnerabilities (string interpolation in queries), hardcoded credentials, missing input validation, no rate limiting, inconsistent error handling (empty catch block), missing auth middleware, no timeout configuration, missing request logging, no CORS configuration, missing tests.
expectations: Review includes dimension scores table with 9 rows
Identifies missing authentication on PUT/DELETE endpoints
Identifies inconsistent parameterized vs string concat queries
Includes top 3 critical issues with severity labels
